memoryArtifacts.headline: Francis Matthews of Ottery St. Mary & Durham Point
memoryArtifacts.description:
FRANCIS MATTHEWS

m.22 Nov. 1622 Ottery St. Mary, Devon, Mrs. Thomasine (Tamsen) Channon (d.c.1690), d. of Henry Channon 
d. between 10 May and 19 Dec. 1648

An interesting tradition in Ottery St. Mar …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Matthews於1598年出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親Samuel Tamsen Mathews28歲，母親Mary Francis Hinton23歲。他於1622年11月28日與Thamsine Channon在英國英格蘭戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1648年12月19日在美國新罕布夏州斯特拉福德享年50歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州斯特拉福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Matthews于1598年出生在英国英格兰戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲Samuel Tamsen Mathews28岁，母亲Mary Francis Hinton23岁。他于1622年11月28日与Thamsine Channon在英国英格兰戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1648年12月19日在美国新罕布什尔州斯特拉福德享年50岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州斯特拉福德。

nameMeanings.name: Matthews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Ulster and County Louth): patronymic from the personal name Matthew . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, such as German Matthäus (from the personal name Matthäus, from Latin Matthaeus) and Slovenian Matavž (from an obsolete vernacular form of the personal name Matevž, from Latin Matthaeus). Compare Mathews .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Mathghamhna (see McMahon ).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Matthews was born in 1598, in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Samuel Tamsen Mathews, was 28 and his mother, Mary Francis Hinton, was 23. He married Thamsine Channon on 28 November 1622, in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 19 December 1648, in Strafford, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 50, and was buried in Strafford, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Matthews est né en 1598, à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Samuel Tamsen Mathews, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Francis Hinton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Thamsine Channon le 28 novembre 1622, à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1648, à Strafford, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Strafford, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Matthewsが1598年にイギリスイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーで生まれた時，父Samuel Tamsen Mathewsは28歳，母Mary Francis Hintonは23歳であった。1622年11月28日にイギリスイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーでThamsine Channonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1648年12月19日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードで50歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Matthews(이)가 1598년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Tamsen Mathews(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Francis Hinton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1622년 11월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에서 Thamsine Channon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1648년 12월 19일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Matthews nasceu em 1598, em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Samuel Tamsen Mathews, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Francis Hinton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Thamsine Channon em 28 de novembro de 1622, em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1648, em Strafford, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Strafford, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Matthews родился в 1598 г. в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Samuel Tamsen Mathews было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Francis Hinton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Thamsine Channon 28 ноября 1622 г. в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 декабря 1648 г. в местности страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Matthews nació en 1598, en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Samuel Tamsen Mathews, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Francis Hinton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thamsine Channon el 28 de noviembre de 1622, en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1648, en Strafford, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Strafford, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
